etymology.description: 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog") + 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + ⺼(⺼) (ròu, "meat") = dog eating meat -> "satisfied" -> 口 corrupted into 甘(甘) (gān, "sweet") then 日(日) (rì, "sun")
etymology.interpretation: The character depicts a dog eating, symbolizing contentment or satisfaction from a meal. Over time, the components transformed, with 口 evolving into 甘, which ultimately became 日 in its modern form.
